title: Draft RBI (Commercial Banks – Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy) Fifth Amendment Directions, 2026
description:
The Reserve Bank of India has removed a key provision from capital adequacy norms to ensure consistency with updated investment rules. The amendment simplifies regulatory requirements and eliminates redundancy.
The post Draft RBI (Commercial Banks – Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy) Fifth Amendment Directions, 2026 appeared first on TaxGuru.
